mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(job.id) AS id, job.status, job.version, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(job.policy_json, '$.providerId') ), 'fake' ) AS providerId, JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( profile.config_json, '$.execution.rootCapability.id' ) ) AS rootCapabilityId, CAST( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( profile.config_json, '$.execution.rootCapability.version' ) ) AS UNSIGNED ) AS rootCapabilityVersion FROM job LEFT JOIN agent_profile profile ON profile.id = job.agent_profile_id WHERE job.id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} FOR UPDATE

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(candidate.id) AS id, candidate.goal, candidate.status, candidate.version, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( parent_task.title, ': ', COALESCE( ( SELECT parent_run.result_summary FROM task_run parent_run WHERE parent_run.task_id = parent_task.id AND parent_run.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY parent_run.attempt_no DESC LIMIT 1 ), '已完成' ) ) ORDER BY parent_task.sequence_no SEPARATOR '\n' ) FROM task_dependency dependency JOIN task parent_task ON parent_task.id = dependency.depends_on_task_id WHERE dependency.task_id = candidate.id ) AS dependencyContext FROM task candidate WHERE candidate.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND candidate.status = 'READY' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task_dependency dependency JOIN task parent_task ON parent_task.id = dependency.depends_on_task_id WHERE dependency.task_id = candidate.id AND parent_task.status != 'COMPLETED' ) ORDER BY candidate.sequence_no ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(candidate.id) AS id, candidate.goal, candidate.status, candidate.version, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( parent_task.title, ': ', COALESCE( ( SELECT parent_run.result_summary FROM task_run parent_run WHERE parent_run.task_id = parent_task.id AND parent_run.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY parent_run.attempt_no DESC LIMIT 1 ), '已完成' ) ) ORDER BY parent_task.sequence_no SEPARATOR '\n' ) FROM task_dependency dependency JOIN task parent_task ON parent_task.id = dependency.depends_on_task_id WHERE dependency.task_id = candidate.id ) AS dependencyContext FROM task candidate WHERE candidate.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND candidate.status = 'READY' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task_dependency dependency JOIN task parent_task ON parent_task.id = dependency.depends_on_task_id WHERE dependency.task_id = candidate.id AND parent_task.status != 'COMPLETED' ) ORDER BY candidate.sequence_no ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, active_task_run_id = #{activeTaskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_run_dispatch ( id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, status ) VALUES ( #{dispatchId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE task_run_dispatch SET status = 'CLAIMED', worker_id = #{workerId}, claimed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 WHERE id = #{dispatchId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'PENDING' AND available_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)

UPDATE task_run_dispatch SET status = #{status}, last_error = #{lastError}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{dispatchId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'CLAIMED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loop_run ( id, task_run_id, parent_type, parent_id, status, policy_json, scoped_context_json, recursion_depth ) VALUES ( #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{parentType}, #{parentId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, 'RUNNING', CAST(#{policyJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{scopedContextJson} AS JSON), #{recursionDepth} )

INSERT INTO loop_node ( id, loop_run_id, parent_node_id, node_type, action_type, goal, status, current_phase, depth, iteration_no, side_effect_class, idempotency_key, input_json, scoped_context_json, decision_json ) VALUES ( #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{parentNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, 'ATOMIC', 'MODEL_CALL', #{goal}, 'RUNNING', 'CONTEXT_BUILD', #{depth}, #{iterationNo}, 'NONE', #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{inputJson} AS JSON), JSON_OBJECT(), JSON_OBJECT( 'type', 'PENDING', 'provider', #{providerId} ) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loop_node WHERE loop_run_id = #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
SELECT status FROM loop_node WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.update: UPDATE loop_node SET action_type = #{actionType}, decision_json = CAST(#{decisionJson} AS JSON), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loop_node_phase ( id, loop_node_id, phase_type, sequence_no, status, summary, input_json, output_json, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{phaseId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{phaseType}, #{sequenceNo}, 'COMPLETED', #{summary}, CAST(#{inputJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{outputJson} AS JSON), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) )

INSERT INTO loop_node_phase ( id, loop_node_id, phase_type, sequence_no, status, summary, input_json ) VALUES ( #{phaseId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{phaseType}, #{sequenceNo}, 'RUNNING', #{summary}, CAST(#{inputJson} AS JSON) )
mapper.update: UPDATE loop_node_phase SET status = 'COMPLETED', summary = #{summary}, output_json = CAST(#{outputJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{phaseId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node_phase SET status = 'FAILED', summary = #{summary}, output_json = CAST(#{outputJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{phaseId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node_phase SET status = 'RUNNING', summary = '恢复执行：安全重试既有动作阶段', output_json = NULL, completed_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{phaseId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND phase_type = 'ACTION_EXECUTION' AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'COMPLETED', 'FAILED')
UPDATE loop_node SET current_phase = #{phaseType}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'WAITING_CHILDREN', current_phase = 'ADJUSTMENT', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB', current_phase = 'ACTION_EXECUTION', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE task_run SET status = 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'WAITING_HUMAN', current_phase = 'ACTION_EXECUTION', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE task_run SET status = 'WAITING_HUMAN', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'RUNNING', current_phase = 'OBSERVATION', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ( 'WAITING_CHILDREN', 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB', 'WAITING_HUMAN' )

UPDATE task_run SET status = 'RUNNING', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB'
UPDATE task_run SET status = 'RUNNING', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'WAITING_HUMAN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint ( id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, sequence_no, checkpoint_type, state_json, event_offset, checksum, restorable ) VALUES ( #{checkpointId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{sequenceNo}, #{checkpointType}, CAST(#{stateJson} AS JSON), #{eventOffset}, LOWER(SHA2(CAST(CAST(#{stateJson} AS JSON) AS CHAR), 256)), TRUE )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sequence_no), 0) + 1 FROM checkpoint WHERE task_run_id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.update: UPDATE task_run SET latest_checkpoint_id = #{checkpointId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'COMPLETED', observation_json = CAST(#{observationJson} AS JSON), output_json = CAST(#{outputJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'WAITING_CHILDREN')

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'COMPLETED', observation_json = CAST(#{observationJson} AS JSON), output_json = CAST(#{outputJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE loop_run_id = #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'WAITING_CHILDREN'

UPDATE loop_run SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

UPDATE task_run SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_summary = #{resultSummary}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE task_run SET status = 'FAILED', result_summary = #{failureSummary}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'FAILED', observation_json = CAST(#{observationJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

UPDATE loop_node SET status = 'FAILED', observation_json = CAST(#{observationJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE loop_run_id = #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'WAITING_CHILDREN')

UPDATE loop_run SET status = 'FAILED', completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evidence ( id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, evidence_type, subject_ref, result, details_json ) VALUES ( #{evidenceId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{evidenceType}, #{subjectRef}, 'PASS', CAST(#{detailsJson} AS JSON) )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sequence_no), 0) + 1 FROM runtime_event WHERE aggregate_id = #{aggregateId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_event ( id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload_json, sequence_no ) VALUES ( #{eventId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{sequenceNo} )

INSERT INTO outbox_event (id, event_type, payload_json, status) VALUES ( #{eventId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(task_id) AS taskId, run_type AS runType, status, attempt_no AS attemptNo, result_summary AS resultSummary, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM task_run WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, sequence_no AS sequenceNo, checkpoint_type AS checkpointType, restorable, checksum, checksum = LOWER(SHA2(CAST(state_json AS CHAR), 256)) AS checksumValid, created_at AS createdAt FROM checkpoint WHERE task_run_id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY sequence_no

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(node.id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(node.parent_node_id) AS parentNodeId, node.depth, node.iteration_no AS iterationNo, node.action_type AS actionType, node.goal, node.status, node.current_phase AS currentPhase, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(node.observation_json, '$.summary')) AS observation, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(node.output_json, '$.content')) AS output, node.started_at AS startedAt, node.completed_at AS completedAt FROM loop_node node JOIN loop_run run ON run.id = node.loop_run_id WHERE run.task_run_id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY node.depth, node.iteration_no, node.started_at

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, phase_type AS phaseType, sequence_no AS sequenceNo, status, summary, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM loop_node_phase WHERE loop_node_id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY sequence_no

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, evidence_type AS evidenceType, subject_ref AS subjectRef, result, created_at AS createdAt FROM evidence WHERE task_run_id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at
